findings.title: Managed Compute: Mix of Kubernetes and Legacy VM Support
Network Security: No Network Isolation Defined
API Entry Point: No Managed Gateway
Backup and Recovery: No Backup Configuration
High Availability: Multi-Master Supported but Not Multi-AZ
IaC Coverage: Partial - K8s Layer Only
CI/CD Automation: CI Only, No Deployment
Programming Languages: Java 8 with Compound Legacy Dependencies
Service Discovery: K8s DNS + Static Files

Secrets Management: Environment Variables, No Rotation
Compute Hardening: No Patching or Scanning

items.description: Adopt modern CI/CD, IaC, observability, and operational practices.
Decompose monoliths, adopt cloud-native patterns, implement event-driven architecture.
Migrate self-managed databases to AWS managed database services.
Containerize applications for consistent deployment, scalability, and portability.
Migrate self-managed analytics workloads to AWS managed analytics services.
Integrate AI/ML capabilities using AWS AI services.

recommended_actions.name: Microsoft Modernization Program
recommended_actions.trigger_reason: C#/.NET detected in 5 services: Lidarr--Lidarr, Prowlarr--Prowlarr, Radarr--Radarr, Sonarr--Sonarr, greenshot--greenshot

recommended_actions.name: Windows App Modernization Program
recommended_actions.trigger_reason: C#/.NET services may have Windows deployment targets — verify deployment environment

recommended_actions.name: Experience-Based Acceleration
recommended_actions.trigger_reason: 25 services have triggered pathways AND score < 3.0

recommended_actions.name: ISV Workload Migration Program
